name: Free fall in uniform gravity (no air resistance)
conventions: y positive upward, measured from chosen origin
v_0 positive when initial velocity points upward
expectedLimits: landing (y = 0, y_0 > 0): t_land = (v_0 + sqrt(v_0^2 + 2 g y_0))/g
energy conservation: (1/2) v^2 + g y = const along trajectory
references: Halliday, Resnick & Walker — Fundamentals of Physics, ch.2
